glosses.ja: ワックスをかける; 磨く

sentences.target: Je cire mes chaussures avant de sortir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə siʁ me ʃo.syʁ avɑ̃ də sɔʁtiʁ/

translations.fr: Je cire mes chaussures avant de sortir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə siʁ me ʃo.syʁ avɑ̃ də sɔʁtiʁ/
translations.en: I polish my shoes before going out.
translations.es: Lustro mis zapatos antes de salir.
translations.de: Ich poliere meine Schuhe, bevor ich ausgehe.
translations.it: Lucido le mie scarpe prima di uscire.
translations.pt: Eu engraxo meus sapatos antes de sair.
translations.he: אני מצחצח את הנעליים לפני שאני יוצא.
translations.vi: Tôi đánh bóng giày trước khi ra ngoài.
translations.nl: Ik poets mijn schoenen voordat ik naar buiten ga.
translations.uk: Я начищаю свої черевики перед виходом.
translations.hi: बाहर जाने से पहले मैं अपने जूते पॉलिश करता हूँ।
translations.el: Γυαλίζω τα παπούτσια μου πριν βγω έξω.
translations.nb: Jeg pusser skoene mine før jeg går ut.
translations.sv: Jag putsar mina skor innan jag går ut.
translations.ro: Îmi lustruiesc pantofii înainte să ies.
translations.da: Jeg pudser mine sko, før jeg går ud.
translations.fi: Kiillotan kenkäni ennen kuin lähден ulos.
translations.ja: 出かける前に靴を磨きます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; action of polishing.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, plural form; agrees with plural noun 'chaussures'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'cire'.
Preposition forming the complex 'avant de' before an infinitive; introduces a temporal complement.
Preposition linking 'avant' to an infinitive ('sortir').
Infinitive verb functioning as complement to 'avant de'.

sentences.target: Tu cires le parquet cet après-midi.
sentences.reading: /ty siʁ lə paʁkɛ sɛt apʁɛ midi/

translations.fr: Tu cires le parquet cet après-midi.
translations.ipa: /ty siʁ lə paʁkɛ sɛt apʁɛ midi/
translations.en: You’re waxing the floor this afternoon.
translations.de: Heute Nachmittag wachst du den Parkettboden.
translations.it: Questo pomeriggio passi la cera sul parquet.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天下午给地板打蜡。
translations.yue: 你今日下晝會為地板打蠟。
translations.ru: Сегодня днём ты натираешь паркет воском.
translations.pt: Hoje à tarde você vai encerar o chão.
translations.he: אחר הצהריים אתה מורח ווקס על הרצפה.
translations.vi: Chiều nay bạn đánh sáp sàn gỗ.
translations.ar: ستضع الشمع على الأرضية بعد ظهر اليوم.
translations.hi: आज दोपहर तुम फर्श पर वैक्स लगाओगे।
translations.el: Σήμερα το απόγευμα κερώνεις το πάτωμα.
translations.ro: Astăzi după-amiază dai cu ceară pe parchet.
translations.ja: あなたは今日の午後に床にワックスをかけます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'parquet'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular (form before vowel); determines temporal noun phrase.
Compound noun; temporal complement indicating when the action occurs.

sentences.target: J'aime cirer mes bottes en cuir.

translations.fr: J'aime cirer mes bottes en cuir.
translations.en: I like waxing my leather boots.
translations.es: Me gusta encerar mis botas de cuero.
translations.it: Mi piace passare la cera sui miei stivali di pelle.
translations.ko: 나는 가죽 부츠에 왁스를 바르는 걸 좋아해요.
translations.ru: Мне нравится натирать мои кожаные ботинки воском.
translations.pt: Eu gosto de encerar minhas botas de couro.
translations.he: אני אוהב למרוח ווקס על מגפי העור שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi thích đánh sáp đôi ủng da của mình.
translations.ar: أحب أن أضع الشمع على أحذيتي الجلدية.
translations.nl: Ik boen graag mijn leren laarzen.
translations.uk: Мені подобається наносити віск на свої шкіряні чоботи.
translations.hi: मुझे अपने चमड़े के बूटों पर वैक्स लगाना पसंद है।
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να κερώνω τις δερμάτινες μπότες μου.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å vokse skinnstøvlene mine.
translations.id: Aku suka mengoleskan lilin pada sepatu bot kulitku.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att vaxa mina läderstövlar.
translations.ro: Îmi place să dau cu ceară pe bocancii de piele.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at vokse mine læderstøvler.
translations.ja: 私は革のブーツにワックスを塗るのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun contracted before vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes infinitive complement 'cirer'.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'aime'.
Possessive determiner, plural; agrees with 'bottes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'cirer'.
Preposition indicating material/composition.
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'en'.

sentences.target: Maman cire la commode le dimanche.

translations.fr: Maman cire la commode le dimanche.
translations.en: Mom polishes the dresser on Sundays.
translations.es: Mamá pule la cómoda los domingos.
translations.it: La mamma lucida il comò la domenica.
translations.zh-Hans: 妈妈每周日给抽屉柜上蜡。
translations.yue: 阿媽逢星期日會為五斗櫃打蠟。
translations.pt: A mãe lustra a cômoda aos domingos.
translations.he: אמא מבריקה את השידה בימי ראשון.
translations.vi: Mẹ đánh bóng chiếc tủ ngăn kéo vào Chủ nhật.
translations.ar: أمي تلمّع الخزانة ذات الأدراج أيام الأحد.
translations.nl: Mama poetst de ladekast op zondagen.
translations.hi: माँ रविवार को ड्रेसर को पॉलिश करती है।
translations.el: Η μαμά γυαλίζει τη συρταριέρα τις Κυριακές.
translations.id: Ibu memoles lemari laci pada hari Minggu.
translations.ja: 母は日曜日にタンスを磨きます。

tokens.explanation: Common noun used as subject; refers to the mother.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'commode'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object.
Definite article introducing temporal noun phrase 'le dimanche' meaning 'on Sundays'.
Common noun; temporal complement indicating habitual time.
